name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Palm Harbor, FL Cash America Pawn at US Hwy 19 N provides pawn loans and buys on jewelry, electronics, tools, and more.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is located at 36001 US Hwy 19 N in Palm Harbor, FL, operating as a standalone pawn shop. The location is open Monday through Saturday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with Sunday hours closed. This Palm Harbor location serves the local community with convenient access from US Highway 19 North.

At this Palm Harbor pawn shop, you can sell jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, and other items for quick cash. The location also offers pawn loans against collateral if you need short-term financing. Call +1 727-499-0105 for specific questions about items or current interest rates for your situation.

If you're a Palm Harbor resident needing quick cash, bring valid ID and the items you wish to sell or pawn. Cash America Pawn has been serving pawn customers for decades with straightforward transactions and fair valuations.
address: 36001 US Hwy 19 N, Palm Harbor, FL 34684

company_info.headquarters: 36001 US Hwy 19 N, Palm Harbor, FL 34684

pros: 3,300+ retail locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America providing widespread accessibility
Non-recourse pawn loans—customers cannot face wage garnishment or deficiency judgments if they default
No credit check required; immediate cash available regardless of credit history or score
Wide variety of acceptable collateral including jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, and appliances
Publicly traded company (listed on S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000) providing regulatory oversight and transparency
Gold and precious metal buying service offering alternative liquidity for specific assets
Layaway services (10% down) provide structured purchasing option for consumers without immediate full payment ability
cons: Risk of permanent loss of collateral if loan is not repaid—customers must reclaim pledged items within the loan term
Interest rates and fees on pawn loans, while regulated by state law, can be substantial when annualized, especially on short-term renewals
Limited to collateral-based lending; cannot help consumers build credit history or address underlying credit issues
Pawn loans are short-term solutions (typically 30-120 days) and not suitable for long-term financial needs or debt consolidation
Retail merchandise inventory unpredictable; finding specific needed items on shelves cannot be guaranteed
best_for: Unbanked or cash-constrained consumers needing immediate funds without credit approval
Individuals with poor credit seeking short-term emergency cash secured by collateral
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they can temporarily leverage for liquidity
Consumers seeking layaway purchasing plans as alternative to credit cards or financing
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers needing immediate cash and willing to pledge collateral, or those seeking alternative purchasing methods like layaway. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are temporary liquidity tools—not credit-building products—and require repayment or forfeiture of pledged items; they do not address underlying credit issues and carry meaningful effective interest rates on short-term renewals.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Retail sales of used merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and sporting goods
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying
Layaway services with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Retail finance solutions through merchant partner network
Online store locator for finding nearest location
Cash payment on spot for items purchased
